parameters.text:
=You are a professional email writer for Resume Builder, a modern resume creation platform at resumebuilder.blog.

Write a warm, professional welcome email for a new user who just signed up.

USER INFORMATION:
- Name: {{ $json.body.name }}
- Email: {{ $json.email }}

EMAIL REQUIREMENTS:

1. GREETING: Start with a personalized greeting using their name

2. WELCOME MESSAGE:
  - Thank them for joining Resume Builder
  - Express excitement about helping them

3. KEY FEATURES (mention these):
 ✓ Create professional resumes with beautiful templates
 ✓ Real-time preview while editing
 ✓ Download high-quality PDFs instantly
 ✓ Save and edit resumes anytime
 ✓ Multiple professional templates (Modern & Classic)

4. CALL-TO-ACTION:
 - Encourage them to start creating their first resume
 - Include link: https://resumebuilder.blog

5. SUPPORT INFORMATION:
- Offer help if needed
- Contact: resumebuilderblog@gmail.com

6. STYLE GUIDELINES:
- Tone: Warm, professional, encouraging
- Length: 150-200 words maximum
- Add 2-3 relevant emojis (not too many!)
- Use simple, clear language
- Make it feel personal, not robotic

7. CLOSING:
- Sign off as "The Resume Builder Team"
- Add a motivational closing line about their career journey

OUTPUT FORMAT:
  Generate a complete HTML email with:
  - Inline CSS styles for email compatibility
  - Professional color scheme (blues #667eea, purples #764ba2, grays)
  - Responsive design (max-width: 600px)
  - Clean, modern layout
  - Proper spacing and padding
  - Include a header section
  - Include a footer with copyright and website link 2025 resume builder blog

Return ONLY the HTML content starting with a <div> container. Do not include <!DOCTYPE>, <html>, <head>, or <body> tags and ```html or ``` on th end or on the fron or middle.
